items.original_title: Kimi's open model K3 nears GPT-5.6 Sol and Fable 5 while signaling the end of super cheap Chinese AI
items.title_en: Kimi's open model K3 nears GPT-5.6 Sol and Fable 5 while signaling the end of super cheap Chinese AI
items.summary_en: Kimi is launching K3, a multimodal open-weight model with 2.8 trillion parameters and one million tokens of context. In the company's own benchmarks, it comes close to Claude Fable 5 and GPT 5.6 Sol while beating Opus 4.8 and GLM 5.2, in some cases by a wide margin. The model is also significantly pricier than its pre…
items.title_zh: Kimi的开放模型K3接近GPT-5.6 Sol和Fable 5，预示中国AI低价时代结束
items.summary_zh: Kimi公司推出的K3模型参数达到2.8万亿，性能接近Claude Fable 5和GPT-5.6 Sol，标志着高性价比中国AI时代的结束。

items.original_title: The AI compute gap: Enterprises are buying infrastructure faster than they can measure what it costs
items.title_en: The AI compute gap: Enterprises are buying infrastructure faster than they can measure what it costs
items.summary_en: Across 107 enterprises, AI infrastructure spending is accelerating well ahead of the ability to see or steer its economics. Most organizations run their AI on a familiar base of hyperscalers and model-provider APIs, yet the next dollar is aimed at specialized compute almost none of them use today; a majority intend to…
items.title_zh: AI计算差距：企业的基础设施购买速度超过成本测量
items.summary_zh: 107家企业的数据表明，AI基础设施支出正在加速，而这些企业尚未掌握相关成本。

items.original_title: The agent security gap: 54% of enterprises have already had an AI agent incident, and most still let agents share credentials
items.title_en: The agent security gap: 54% of enterprises have already had an AI agent incident, and most still let agents share crede…
items.summary_en: Across 107 enterprises, AI agents are being given real access to systems and data while the controls meant to contain them lag behind. More than half have already had a confirmed agent security incident or a near-miss; only about a third give every agent its own scoped identity, and most agents still share credentials…
items.title_zh: 代理安全差距：54%的企业经历过AI代理安全事件
items.summary_zh: 超过54%的企业已经遭遇AI代理安全事件，控制措施却滞后于实际使用。

items.original_title: Scaling Agentic AI Factories Through Extreme Co-Design with NVIDIA BlueField
items.title_en: Scaling Agentic AI Factories Through Extreme Co-Design with NVIDIA BlueField
items.summary_en: Agentic AI changes the infrastructure pattern for AI factories. One request can trigger many model calls, tool calls, memory lookups, policy checks, storage...
items.title_zh: 通过与NVIDIA BlueField进行极端共设计扩展Agentic AI工厂
items.summary_zh: NVIDIA BlueField与极端共设计的作用改变了AI工厂的基础设施模式。

items.original_title: Why teens deserve access to safe AI
items.title_en: Why teens deserve access to safe AI
items.summary_en: Learn how OpenAI is making ChatGPT safer for teens with age-appropriate protections, learning tools, parental controls, and expert partnerships.
items.title_zh: 青少年也值得拥有安全的AI访问权限
items.summary_zh: OpenAI致力于为青少年提供安全的AI使用环境，推出多项保护措施和工具。

items.original_title: OpenAI wants developers to stop typing commands and start using a joystick to control their AI agents
items.title_en: OpenAI wants developers to stop typing commands and start using a joystick to control their AI agents
items.summary_en: OpenAI and keyboard manufacturer Work Louder have unveiled the Codex Micro, a compact hardware controller designed for working with AI agents. The article OpenAI wants developers to stop typing commands and start using a joystick to control their AI agents appeared first on The Decoder .
items.title_zh: OpenAI希望开发者通过操纵杆控制AI代理
items.summary_zh: OpenAI和Work Louder推出Codex Micro硬件控制器，旨在改善AI代理的使用体验。

items.original_title: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba and Baidu
items.title_en: Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba and Baidu
items.summary_en: The deal, which was rumored to be in the works last year, marks an important step for Apple's AI ambitions in a key market.
items.title_zh: 苹果智能在中国推出，与阿里巴巴和百度合作
items.summary_zh: 苹果在中国推出AI智能，标志着其在关键市场的AI雄心的重要一步。
